text:
“セントラルシティ”には、
食べ物で戦士の力を引き上げる店があるんだよ。
食べるだけで強くなれるなんて、楽でいいよね。

ふわあ……今日は風も心地いいし、
まったりしようかな。

え？　任務？
大丈夫だよ、今日は非

There's a store in Central City that sells food that's supposed to draw out a
warrior's strength.
Getting stronger just by eating sure sounds like a dream, am I right?

Wah... The wind feels great today.
Guess I'll just chill and make the most of it.

Huh? Don't I have any missions?
It's okay, I'm off-duty today.
